name: Eveline Table Lamp - 15 Inch Height - TBL4448 - Natural - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Eveline 15 inch natural rattan table lamp. This beautifully crafted piece captures the essence of relaxed elegance, making it a desirable addition to any room. Its natural color and intricate rattan design bring warmth and texture, effortlessly transforming your home into a cozy retreat. The 15 inch size is perfect for a bedside table, desk, or cozy corner, offering a soft and inviting glow. Whether you're reading, working, or simply unwinding, the Eveline lamp enhances your environment with style and charm. Embrace a fresh and airy look with this timeless piece that blends seamlessly with various decor styles. Add the Eveline rattan table lamp to your collection and elevate your living space with its subtle beauty and inviting presence.
